Solo: ~1300 billable hrs/yr at blended ~$75/hr equivalent
Small firm Year 1: avg project ~500 tons at ~$36/ton blended (low end - earning trust)
Year 3: avg project ~700 tons at $30-50/ton blended (offshore-leveraged delivery)
Offshore modeler all-in cost includes salary + software + workstation + admin overhead
P.E. sub-contract assumed at $1500-2500 per stamped project
Marketing assumes 1 NASCC trip + LinkedIn ads + 1 trade publication article per year
This model is illustrative — adjust hourly rates / per-ton rates / load on offshore team for your specific market
Year 1 cash flow may lag P&L by 60-90 days due to client payment terms
Hold ~3 months of operating cash before scaling headcount
Connection design revenue assumes you have a sub-contracted Texas P.E. from day one
